name: aircraft-health-cag-demo
description: N4798E Aircraft Health Assistant — CAG demo with Python/FastAPI backend and React frontend

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "mock-cdf,api,client" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green" "npm run mock-cdf" "npm run api" "npm run client"
scripts.setup: npm run install:client && npm run install:backend && npm run generate && npm run ingest
